Logic Analysis: config.py
Contains Config class with database URI, secret key, mail settings, upload folder configuration. No imports from project files.
extensions.py
Initializes Flask extensions: db (SQLAlchemy), login_manager (LoginManager), mail (Mail), admin (Admin). Imports from flask and flask extensions.
models.py

Defines all data models: User, Post, Comment, Like, FriendRequest, Follow, Group, GroupMembership, GroupJoinRequest, Message, Notification, Bookmark, Report, AdminLog, Block, NotificationPreference. Imports from extensions.py (db) and werkzeug.security for password hashing.
forms.py
Defines WTForms for registration, login, post creation, comment, group creation, profile edit, notification preferences. Imports from flask_wtf and wtforms.
utils.py
Contains utility functions: save_image (Pillow processing), send_verification_email, create_notification, paginate_query. Imports from extensions.py (mail), models.py, flask, and PIL.
routes_auth.py
Implements auth blueprint: register, login, logout, email verification, password reset. Imports from flask, extensions.py, models.py, forms.py, utils.py.
routes_main.py

Implements main blueprint: feed, create post, like/unlike, comment, friend request management, group management, messaging, user profile, search, notifications, settings, account deletion. Imports from flask, extensions.py, models.py, forms.py, utils.py.
routes_admin.py
Implements admin blueprint: dashboard, user management (suspend/verify), post management (delete), report management, admin logs. Imports from flask, extensions.py, models.py, forms.py, utils.py.
routes_api.py
Implements API blueprint: REST endpoints for posts, users, groups, notifications. Imports from flask, extensions.py, models.py, utils.py.
app.py
Main application entry point: creates Flask app, registers blueprints, configures extensions, runs the server. Imports from config.py, extensions.py, all route files.
Full API spec:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Social Media Platform API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /api/posts:
    get:
      summary: Get paginated feed posts
      parameters:
        - name: page
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: per_page
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of posts
    post:
      summary: Create a new post
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                content:
                  type: string
                images:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                    format: binary
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Post created
  /api/posts/{id}/like:
    post:
      summary: Toggle like on a post
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Like toggled
  /api/posts/{id}/comment:
    post:
      summary: Add comment to post
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                content:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Comment added
  /api/users/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Get user profile
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        '200':
          description: User profile data
  /api/groups:
    get:
      summary: List groups
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of groups
    post:
      summary: Create group
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                name:
                  type: string
                description:
                  type: string
                is_public:
                  type: boolean
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Group created
  /api/notifications:
    get:
      summary: Get user notifications
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of notifications
  /api/search:
    get:
      summary: Search users, posts, groups
      parameters:
        - name: q
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [users, posts, groups]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Search results
Shared Knowledge: `extensions.py` initializes all Flask extensions that are imported by other modules. `models.py` defines all database models with relationships. `utils.py` contains shared utility functions used across route files. All route blueprints are registered in `app.py`. Configuration settings are centralized in `config.py`.
Anything UNCLEAR: The exact implementation of blocking behavior is clarified: when user A blocks user B, both users' posts are hidden from each other's feeds, they cannot send messages to each other, and any existing friend/follow relationships are removed. Notification preferences affect in-app notifications only (not email). Soft-delete means the user's data is marked with a deleted flag and hidden from normal views, but admins can still see it in the admin panel. The 'Saved Posts' list is a single default list; no custom collections are needed. The search uses simple LIKE queries on username, post content, and group name. The admin activity log records actions like ban, delete, verify with timestamp and admin ID.
